sra_title: ZymoBIOMICS Gut Microbiome Standard (catalogue no. D6331) Replicate 1
reads_used: 3,000,000 R1 reads (subsampled from 23,342,973); single-end used for per-read genus classification
composition_reference: Genomic DNA % (datasheet Table 1) — correct reference for shotgun read-count abundance
out_of_set_note: Escherichia 14% (no Escherichia among the 120 genera), Clostridioides 1.5%, Candida 1.5%, Saccharomyces 1.4%, Methanobrevibacter 0.1%, Salmonella 0.01%
kraken2bracken_note: Same DB as bracken_eval; Kraken2 43.9% classified on mock (56.1% unclassified: out-of-set organisms + real error + DB gaps). Bracken redistributed 190,031 root reads. pred_fraction over 1,317,677 genus-assigned reads.
